SESSION.NAME: defaultSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnostic session enables the default diagnostic session in the server(s) and does not support any diagnostic application timeout handling provisions (e.g., TesterPresent service is not necessary to keep the session active). A server shall always start the default diagnostic session when powered up. If no other diagnostic session is started, then the default diagnostic session shall be running as long as the server is powered.

SESSION.NAME: programmingSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession enables all diagnostic services required to support the memory programming of a server. Regardless of whether the programmingSession runs in boot software or not, the ECU shall automatically suspend logging of DTCs and suspend transmission of non-diagnostic frames when entering the programmingSession.

SESSION.NAME: extendedDiagnosticSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession is used to enable timed diagnostic service functionality (e.g., I/O control). The diagnostic functionality in this session shall also include all supported diagnostic functionality supported in the defaultSession.

SESSION.NAME: EOLSupplierDiagnosticSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This session is used to grant special privileges to the module and vehicle manufacturers' End of Line test tool. Diagnostic session 60H is reserved only for use by End of Line test tools in manufacturing and assembly plants. This EOLSupplierDiagnosticSession grants access to all functionality (e.g., diagnostic services, privileges, input/output control, etc.) that is necessary during the assembly testing and contains a superset of the diagnostic functionality supported in the extendedDiagnosticSession (03H).

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #2
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles since the DTC fault detection counter last reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared). The operation cycles during which the test was not completed shall be excluded

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: DTC Fault Detection Counter
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The purpose of this counter is to provide a mechanism for filtering the results of a low-level fault detection process so that test results (pass and fail) can be qualified before setting any DTC status bits.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Vision System Camera

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 3. Rear Camera (DID DE00, Byte-5, Bits 7) configured as Present (1) AND Gear (DID 6310) is in Reverse (0x01). 4. Front Camera (DID DE00, Byte-5, Bit-6) configured as Available (1) AND Gear (DID 6310) is in Drive (0x03 or 0x10). Test is performed if 1 and 2 and (3 OR 4) are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If ((Rear Camera (DID DE00, Byte-5, Bit-7) = "Present" (1)) AND (Type of RVC Camera (DID DE00, Byte-6, Bit-0) = Analog (0))): { Set when video signal is not detected from Rear View Camera for 5 seconds when vehicle is in Reverse (See DID 6310 value). } If ((Front Camera (DID DE00, Byte-5, Bit-6) = "Available" (1)) AND (Type of RVC Camera (DID DE00, Byte-6, Bit-0) = Analog (0))): { Set when video signal is not detected from Front View Camera for 5 seconds when vehicle is in Drive (See DID 6310 value). } If ((Rear Camera (DID DE00, Byte-5, Bit-7) = "Present" (1)) AND (Type of RVC Camera (DID DE00, Byte-6, Bit-0) = Digital (1))): { Set when RVC (or any Digital Camera) has an LVDS Link Detect Fault or General Electrical Failure for 5 seconds when vehicle is in Reverse (See DID 6310 value). }
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: No rear camera display or no front camera display (or any Digital Camera).

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: if (Digital Rear View Camera (DID DE07 Byte-3, Bit-2) = Analog (0)) { J1-14, J1-15 } if (Digital Rear View Camera (DID DE07 Byte-3, Bit-2) = Digital (1)) { J5 }

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 3. Rear Camera (DID DE00, Byte-5, Bit-7) configured as "Present" (1). 4. Gear (DID 6310) is in Reverse (0x01). Test is performed if 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If ((Rear Camera (DID DE00, Byte-1, Bits 2-1) = "Present" (01)) AND (Type of RVC Camera (DID DE00, Byte-6, Bit-0) = Digital (1))): { Set when RVC (or any Digital Camera) has an Unexpected Reset or Reset Request when vehicle is in Reverse (See DID 6310 value). }
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: No rear camera display (or any Digital Camera).

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 3. Rear Camera (DID DE00, Byte-5, Bit-7) configured as "Present" (01). Test is performed if 1 and 2 and 3 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If ((Rear Camera (DID DE00, Byte-5, Bit-7) = "Present" (01)) AND (Type of RVC Camera (DID DE00, Byte-6, Bit-0) = Digital (1))): { Set when RVC (Stand Alone) +9V Diag is not asserted 500ms after the nine volt power (to Digital RVC) has been activated. }

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 3. Rear Camera (DID DE00, Byte-5, Bit-7) configured as "Present" (1). 4. Gear (DID 6310) is in Reverse (0x01). Test is performed if 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If ((Rear Camera (DID DE00, Byte-5, Bit-7) = "Present" (1)) AND (Type of RVC Camera (DID DE00, Byte-6, Bit-0) = Digital (1))): { Set when RVC (Stand Alone) has an Over-temperature condition for 5 seconds when vehicle is in Reverse (See DID 6310 value). }

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 3. Rear Camera (DID DE00, Byte-5, Bit-7) configured as "Present" (1). 4. Gear (DID 6310) is in Reverse (0x01). Test is performed if 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If ((Rear Camera (DID DE00, Byte-5, Bit-7) = "Present" (1)) AND (Type of RVC Camera (DID DE00, Byte-6, Bit-0) = Digital (1))): { Set when RVC (Stand Alone) hasnt received configuration for 5 seconds when vehicle is in Reverse (See DID 6310 value). }

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 3. Rear Camera (DID DE00, Byte-5, Bit-7) configured as "Present" (1). 4. Gear (DID 6310) is in Reverse (0x01). Test is performed if 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If ((Rear Camera (DID DE00, Byte-5, Bit-7) = "Present" (1)) AND (Type of RVC Camera (DID DE00, Byte-6, Bit-0) = Digital (1))): { Set when RVC (or any Digital Camera) has a loss of lock for 5 seconds when vehicle is in Reverse (See DID 6310 value). }
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: No rear camera display (or any Digital Camera).

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 3. Rear Camera (DID DE00, Byte-5, Bit-7) = "Present" (1). 4. Gear (DID 6310) is in Reverse (0x01). Test is performed if 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If ((Rear Camera (DID DE00, Byte-5, Bit-7) = "Present" (1)) AND (Type of RVC Camera (DID DE00, Byte-6, Bit-0) = Digital (1))): { Set when RVC (or any Digital Camera) has lost communication for 3000 miliseconds and no reset when vehicle is in Reverse (See DID 6310 value). }
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: No rear camera display (or any Digital Camera).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: LIN Bus "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 3. ICP(EFP) Network (DID DE01, Byte-11, Bit-5) is set to "LIN" (1). Test is run if 1, 2, and 3 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If (ICP(EFP) Network (DID DE01, Byte-11, Bit-5) is set to "LIN" (1)) AND (ICP(EFP) (DID DE01, Byte-11, Bit-4) is set to "Present" (0)): set when missing LIN signals for greater than five (5) seconds.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Display

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when error has been detected from touchscreen.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: 1) Five instances of Loss of Lock occurs (see DID FD1A, Byte-2, Bit-6). 2) Five instances of Unexpected Resets occurs (see DID FD1A, Byte-2, Bit-5). 3) Five instances of Reset Request occurs (see DID FD1A, Byte-1, Bit-3). Set DTC when (1) or (2) or (3) are true.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when an unexpected display (Gen2) has been detected with display module. See DID FD1A, Byte-2, Bit-1.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when over temperature condition reported in Display.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: 1) Communication with Display microprocessor is lost for greater than five (5) seconds. See DID FD1A, Byte-1, Bit-4. 2) LVDS Source Module detects a condition where the LVDS link is operational but the display microcontroller has a persistent NAK response. See DID FD1A, Byte-1, Bit-1. Trigger DTC when (1) or (2) are true.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: GPS Antenna

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when GPS Antenna is Short to Ground or Battery for greater than (>) than 250ms.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when GPS Antenna is Open for greater than (>) than 250ms.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: USB Port

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run when 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when USB1 is shorted to ground or overloaded.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: USB Port #2

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when Remote USB Port 1 is shorted to grounf or overloaded
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Remote USB Port 1 no longer functions
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Remote USB Port 1 no longer functions

DTC.DESCRIPTION: External Media Control Connectivity

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when MCM power output is shorted to ground for greater than one (1) second.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Consumer Apps

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If the ALM components persist information about installed apps in files which are corrupted which cannot be corected.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Some installed apps may not work properly

DTC.DESCRIPTION: USB Port #3

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when Remote USB Port 2 is shorted to ground or overloaded.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Remote USB Port 2 no longer functions
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Remote USB Port 2 no longer functions

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Microphone Input
Lost Communication With ECM/PCM "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 2. Last known signal "Ignition_Status" is RUN. 3. Last known signal "PwPckTq_D_Stat" is not PqPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail. 4. Last known signal "ElPw_D_Stat" (if not "Not_Supported") is not LV_Event_In_Progress. 5. The signal Ignition_Status has not changed in last 1000ms. 6. The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat has not changed in last 1000ms. 7. The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if not "Not_Supported") has not changed in last 1000ms. Test is run when 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 and 5 and 6 and 7 are true
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If Architecture Version (DE00, Byte-12, Bits-1-0) is set to "FNV2" (01): Set when message 0x202 and 0x38A are missing for more than five (5) seconds. For message 0x38A the signal TurnLghtSwtch_D_Stat_UB must be set to "Fresh_Data" in order to Pass. If Architecture Version (DE00, Byte-12, Bits-1-0) is set to "FNV3" (10): Set when message 0x202 and 0x83 are missing for more than five (5) seconds. If Reverse Gear (DE00, Byte-10, Bit-3) is set to "New (GearPos_D_Trg)" (1) AND Architecture Version (DE00, Byte-12, Bits-1-0) is set to "FNV2" (01): set when message 0x283 is missing for more than five (5) seconds. For message 0x283 the signal GearPos_D_Trg_UB must be set to "Fresh_Data" in order to Pass. If Reverse Gear (DE00, Byte-10, Bit-3) is set to "New (GearPos_D_Trg)" (1) AND Architecture Version (DE00, Byte-12, Bits-1-0) is set to "FNV3" (10): set when message 0x176 is missing for more than five (5) seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Bezel Diagnostics will be disabled for (0x202 and 0x38A) or (0x202 and 0x83). Driving Restrictions will be enabled for (0x202 and 0x38A) or (0x202 and 0x83). Reverse message is lost for 0x283 or 0x176.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Anti-Lock Brake System (ABS) Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 2. Last known signal "Ignition_Status" is RUN. 3. Last known signal "PwPckTq_D_Stat" is not PqPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail. 4. Last known signal "ElPw_D_Stat" (if not "Not_Supported") is not LV_Event_In_Progress. 5. The signal Ignition_Status has not changed in last 1000ms. 6. The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat has not changed in last 1000ms. 7. The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if not "Not_Supported") has not changed in last 1000ms. Test is run when 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 and 5 and 6 and 7 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: 1)Set when message 0x216 (_WheelData) is missing for more than five seconds from the ABS. 2) If "Auto Hold" (DID DE00 Byte-12, Bit-6) = "Enabled" (1) AND Architecture Version (DE00, Byte-12, Bits-1-0) is set to "FNV2" (01): { Set when 0x27A (GWM_Send_Signals_7) is missing for more than five (5) seconds from the GWM. } 3) If "Auto Hold" (DID DE00 Byte-12, Bit-6) = "Enabled" (1) AND Architecture Version (DE00, Byte-12, Bits-1-0) is set to "FNV3" (10): { Set when 0x41E (BrakeSysFeatures_3_HS3) is missing for more than five (5). } 4) If "Park Hold" (DID DE00 Byte-6, Bit-2-1) = "Enabled" (01) OR "Selectable Drive Mode" (DID DE00 Byte-19, Bit-7) = "Enabled "(01): { Set when 0x420 (SelectDriveModeData_HS3) is missing for more than five (5) seconds. } DTC is set if (1 or 2 or 3 or 4) are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: If message 0x216 missing for more than five (5) seconds. Loss of Dead Reckoning. If message 0x27A is missing for more than five (5) seconds. Auto hold feature will turn off on the menu. If message 0x41E is missing for more than five (5) seconds. Auto hold feature will turn off on the menu. If message 0x420 is missing for more than five (5) seconds. Park Hold Button will be greyed out and will be disabled, and/or Selectable Drive Mode may not function.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Vehicle Dynamics Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 2. Last known signal "Ignition_Status" is RUN. 3. Last known signal "PwPckTq_D_Stat" is not PqPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail. 4. Last known signal "ElPw_D_Stat" (if not "Not_Supported") is not LV_Event_In_Progress. 5. The signal Ignition_Status has not changed in last 1000ms. 6. The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat has not changed in last 1000ms. 7. The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if not "Not_Supported") has not changed in last 1000ms. Test is run when 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 and 5 and 6 and 7 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If On-Board Scales (DID DE00, Byte-20, Bit-4) = "Enabled" (1) or If Smart Hitch (DID DE00, Byte-20, Bit-3) = "Enabled" (1): set when message 0x23B is missing for more than five (5) seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: OBS and Smart Hitch Screen will appear.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Body Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 2. Last known signal "Ignition_Status" is RUN. 3. Last known signal "PwPckTq_D_Stat" is not PqPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail. 4. Last known signal "ElPw_D_Stat" (if not "Not_Supported") is not LV_Event_In_Progress. 5. The signal Ignition_Status has not changed in last 1000ms. 6. The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat has not changed in last 1000ms. 7. The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if not "Not_Supported") has not changed in last 1000ms. Test is run when 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 and 5 and 6 and 7 are true (timeout timer is reset when any of the above are false).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If Ambient-Lighting (DID DE00, Byte-8, Bit-2) = "Present" (1) set when message ICAN:0x3E3 is missing for five seconds. Set when message ICAN:0x3B2 is missing for five seconds. Set when message ICAN:0x331 is missing for five seconds. Set when message ICAN:0x40A is missing for five seconds. If Backup Start Passcode (DID DE00, Byte-13, Bit-7) = "Enabled" (1) set when message ICAN:0x38D is missing for five seconds. If 360 Lighting (DID DE00, Byte-12, Bit-3) = "Enabled" (1) set when message 0x3BA or 0x3C3 is missing for greater than five (5) seconds. set when the signals "ExtLght_D_Falt_UB", "ExtLghtAlrt_B_Rq_UB", "ExtLghtFront_D_Stat_UB", and "ExtLghtRear_D_Stat_UB" have not changed for five seconds. If 360 Lighting (DID DE00, Byte-12, Bit-3) = "Enabled" (1) set when message 0x32A is missing for greater than five (5) seconds. set when the signal "ExtLghtDsply_B_StatArb" is missing for five seconds. If 360 Lighting (DID DE00, Byte-12, Bit-3) = "Enabled" (1) and If 360 Lighting: Number of Zones (DE00, Byte-12, Bit-2) = "4 zones" (1) set when the signals "ExtLghtLeft_D_Stat_UB" and "ExtLghtRight_D_Stat_UB" have not changed for five seconds. If On-Board Scales (DID DE00, Byte-20, Bit-4) = "Enabled" (1) or If Smart Hitch (DID DE00, Byte-20, Bit-3) = "Enabled" (1): set when message 0x3DF or 0x3EC is missing for greater than five (5) seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: HVAC Personalization will be lost and Ambient Lighting for APIM will be turned off for message 0x3E3. APIM will power down for message 0x3B2. Welcome screens and other welcome strategies may not work properly and farewell strategy might not operate correctly for message 0x331. VIN will not be captured correctly for message 0x40A. OBS and Smart Hitch Fault Screen will appear for message 0x3DF or 0x3EC.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Restraints Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 2. Last known signal "Ignition_Status" is RUN. 3. Last known signal "PwPckTq_D_Stat" is not PqPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail. 4. Last known signal "ElPw_D_Stat" (if not "Not_Supported") is not LV_Event_In_Progress. 5. The signal Ignition_Status has not changed in last 1000ms. 6. The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat has not changed in last 1000ms. 7. The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if not "Not_Supported") has not changed in last 1000ms. Test is run when 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 and 5 and 6 and 7 are true (timeout timer is reset when any of the above are false).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If Emergency Assistance (911 Assist) (DID DE01 Byte-10, Bit-6) configured as "Enabled" (0), set when message 0x4A is missing for five seconds. If ( (Internal Gyro (DID DE04 Byte-2, Bit-1) configured as "Not Present" (0)) AND (Gyro on Bus (DID DE04 Byte-2, Bit-0) configured as "Present" (1)) ), Set when message 0x27A is missing for five seconds. For message 0x27A the signal AutoHoldSwMde_B_Ind_UB must be set to "Fresh_Data" in order to Pass.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: ECall will not work properly (when missing 0x4A). Dead reckoning function will not work (when missing 0x91 or 0x27A).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Instrument Panel Cluster (IPC) Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 2. Last known signal "Ignition_Status" is RUN. 3. Last known signal "PwPckTq_D_Stat" is not PqPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail. 4. Last known signal "ElPw_D_Stat" (if not "Not_Supported") is not LV_Event_In_Progress. 5. The signal Ignition_Status has not changed in last 1000ms. 6. The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat has not changed in last 1000ms. 7. The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if not "Not_Supported") has not changed in last 1000ms. Test is run when 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 and 5 and 6 and 7 are true (timeout timer is reset when any of the above are false).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when message 0x225 is missing for 5 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: APIM prompt generator won't know if chimes are active

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Parking Assist Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 2. Last known signal "Ignition_Status" is RUN. 3. Last known signal "PwPckTq_D_Stat" is not PqPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail. 4. Last known signal "ElPw_D_Stat" (if not "Not_Supported") is not LV_Event_In_Progress. 5. The signal Ignition_Status has not changed in last 1000ms. 6. The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat has not changed in last 1000ms. 7. The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if not "Not_Supported") has not changed in last 1000ms. Test is run when 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 and 5 and 6 and 7 are true (timeout timer is reset when any of the above are false).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If PDC HMI (DID DE07, Byte-1, Bit-7) = "On" (1) set when message 0x3AA or 0x3AB is missing for 5 seconds. If (Park Aid (DID DE07, Byte-4) configured as "SAPP" or "APA" (3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, or 9)) set when message 0x3A8 is missing for 5 seconds. If (Parking Assistance (DID DE07, Byte-4) configured as "FAPA with RePA" (0x06), "SAPP with APA Deluxe" (0x0C), "FAPA with APA Deluxe" (0x0D), or "FAPA and RePA with APA Deluxe" (0x0E)): set when message 0x3AE, 0x4D3, 0x4D4, or 0x4D5 is missing for 5 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: If messages (0x3AA or 0x3AB) missing for more than five (5) seconds. Loss of PDC popups. If message (0x3A8) missing for more than five (5) seconds. Loss of Parking Aid or functionality. If messages (0x3AE, 0x4D3, 0x4D4, or 0x4D5) missing for more than five (5) seconds. Auto Park System fault popup will show.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Navigation Display Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run when 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: See REQ-199371 to set DTC C16200. (When the LVDS Source Module is providing power to the LVDS Slave Module, it shall monitor LVDS chip register LINK Status. If the LVDS Source Module detects an LVDS serial link fault it shall set DID LVDS Link Fault)

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Radio

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 2. Last known signal "Ignition_Status" is RUN. 3. Last known signal "PwPckTq_D_Stat" is not PqPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail. 4. Last known signal "ElPw_D_Stat" (if not "Not_Supported") is not LV_Event_In_Progress. 5. The signal Ignition_Status has not changed in last 1000ms. 6. The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat has not changed in last 1000ms. 7. The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if not "Not_Supported") has not changed in last 1000ms. Test is run when 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 and 5 and 6 and 7 are true (timeout timer is reset when any of the above are false).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when message 0x223 is missing for more than 5 seconds. Set when message 0x2D5, 0x2D6, 0x2D8, 0x2D9, 0x2DC, 0x2F5, and 0x3E8 is missing for more than 5 seconds. If HD-Radio (DID DE00 Byte-2, Bit-7) configured as "Available" (1), set when message 0x2F7 is missing for 5 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: APIM won't generate prompts for message 0x223. Loss of radio functions for message 0x2D5 - 0x2DC, 0x2E6, 0x2F5, or 0x3E8. Loss of HD functions for message 0x2F7.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Entertainment Control Module-Rear "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 2. Last known signal "Ignition_Status" is RUN. 3. Last known signal "PwPckTq_D_Stat" is not PqPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail. 4. Last known signal "ElPw_D_Stat" (if not "Not_Supported") is not LV_Event_In_Progress. 5. The signal Ignition_Status has not changed in last 1000ms. 6. The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat has not changed in last 1000ms. 7. The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if not "Not_Supported") has not changed in last 1000ms. Test is run when 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 and 5 and 6 and 7 are true (timeout timer is reset when any of the above are false).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If (RSEM (DID DE00 Byte-1, Bit-4) configured as "Available" (1)) OR (REFP (DID DE00 Byte-2, Bit-5) configured as "Available" (1)). Set when message 0x2A2 is missing for more than five (5) seconds

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Telematic Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 2. Last known signal "Ignition_Status" is RUN. 3. Last known signal "PwPckTq_D_Stat" is not PqPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail. 4. Last known signal "ElPw_D_Stat" (if not "Not_Supported") is not LV_Event_In_Progress. 5. The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if not "Not_Supported") has not changed in last 1000ms. Test is run when 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 and 5 and 6 and 7 are true
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If TCU (DID DE01, Byte-9, Bit-7) is set to "Present" (1): set when message 0x28B is missing for more than five (5) seconds. If TCU (DID DE01, Byte-9, Bit-7) is set to "Present" (1) AND GPS from External (DID DE01, Byte-9, Bit-2) is set to "Present" (1) AND Offboard GNSS Transport (DE09 Byte-13 Bit-4) is set to "CAN" (0): set when message 0x21E is missing for more than Sixty (60) seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: For message 0x28B: Loss of CPP Functionality For message 0x21E: Loss of GPS information

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Seat Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 2. Last known signal "Ignition_Status" is RUN. 3. The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if not "Not_Supported") has not changed in last 1000ms. Test is run when 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 and 5 and 6 and 7 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If (Enhanced Memory (DID DE00 Byte-9, Bit-1) = "Enabled" (1)) AND (DSM (DID DE00,byte-19, Bit-5)= "Present" (1)) set when message 0x3E1 is missing for five seconds.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Seat Control Module "B"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 2. Last known signal "Ignition_Status" is RUN. 3. Last known signal "PwPckTq_D_Stat" is not PqPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail. 4. Last known signal "ElPw_D_Stat" (if not "Not_Supported") is not LV_Event_In_Progress. 5. The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if not "Not_Supported") has not changed in last 1000ms. Test is run when 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 and 5 and 6 and 7 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If (Lumbar (DID DE00 Byte-11, Bit-3-2) configured as "2 Way" (01) OR Lumbar (DID DE00 Byte-11, Bit-3-2) configured as "4 Way" (10)) AND Driver Only MCS (DID DE00 Byte-12, Bit-4) configured as "Disabled" (0) AND Architecture Version (DE00, Byte-12, Bits-1-0) is set to "FNV2" (01): Set when message 0x274 is missing for more than five (5) seconds. For message 0x274 the signal SeatScrnDrvOn_B_Rq_UB must be set to "Fresh_Data" in order to Pass. If (Lumbar (DID DE00 Byte-11, Bit-3-2) configured as "2 Way" (01) OR Lumbar (DID DE00 Byte-11, Bit-3-2) configured as "4 Way" (10)) AND Driver Only MCS (DID DE00 Byte-12, Bit-4) configured as "Disabled" (0) AND Architecture Version (DE00, Byte-12, Bits-1-0) is set to "FNV3" (10): Set when message 0x304 is missing for more than five (5) seconds.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication with Wireless Accessory Charging Module "A"

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Steering Column Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 2. Last known signal "Ignition_Status" is RUN. 3. Last known signal "PwPckTq_D_Stat" is not PqPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail. 4. Last known signal "ElPw_D_Stat" (if not "Not_Supported") is not LV_Event_In_Progress. 5. DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Remote Function Actuation Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 2. Last known signal "Ignition_Status" is RUN. 3. Last known signal "PwPckTq_D_Stat" is not PqPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail. 4. Last known signal "ElPw_D_Stat" (if not "Not_Supported") is not LV_Event_In_Progress. 5. The signal Ignition_Status has not changed in last 1000ms. 6. The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat has not changed in last 1000ms. 7. The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if not "Not_Supported") has not changed in last 1000ms. Test is run when 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 and 5 and 6 and 7 are true (timeout timer is reset when any of the above are false).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If Backup Start Passcode (DID DE00 Byte-13, Bit-7) configured as Enabled (1) AND Architecture Version (DE00, Byte-12, Bits-1-0) is set to "FNV2" (01): Set for Update Bit signals (IgnPsswrdSetup_B_Rq_UB or IgnPsswrdLckout_B_Stat_UB or IgnPsswrdActv_B_Stat_UB) in message 0x281 has not updated for greater than five (5) seconds. If Backup Start Passcode (DID DE00 Byte-13, Bit-7) configured as Enabled (1) AND Architecture Version (DE00, Byte-12, Bits-1-0) is set to "FNV3" (10): Set when message 0x26A is missing for greater than five (5) seconds.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received from Anti-Lock Brake System (ABS) Control Module "A"

Test is run when 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 and 5 and 6 and 7 are true (timeout timer is reset when any of the above are false).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: 1) Trigger if _WheelData (0x216) signals (WhlDirFl_D_Actl and WhlDirFr_D_Actl and WhlDir_Rl_D_Actl and WhlDir_Rr_D_Actl) = Failed (0x03) for more than five seconds. 2) If "Selectable Drive Mode" (DID DE00, Byte-19, Bit-7) = "Enabled" (1): { CCPU Sets when receiving Not Used states for Drive Mode for greater than five seconds from the ABS or no HMI mode assigned to requested Drive Mode. } DTC is set if (1 or 2) is true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: If pass / fail conditions 1 is TRUE. Loss of Dead Reckoning. If pass / fail condition 2 is TRUE. Selectable drive mode may not work properly.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 2. Last known signal "Ignition_Status" is RUN. 3. Test is run when 1 and 2 and 3 and 4 and 5 and 6 and 7 are true (timeout timer is reset when any of the above are false).

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Selectable drive mode may not work correctly
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Selectable drive mode may not work correctly

If On-Board Scales (DID DE00, Byte-20, Bit-4) = "Enabled" (1): set when signals VehPayload_M_Est = 0x3FF (Fault) or VehPayload_Pc_Es = 0x7F (Fault) or VehPayload_Add_M_Est = 0x7FF (Fault) for more than five (5) seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Smart Hitch Fault Screen will appear. OBS Fault Screen will appear.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Body Control Module

If Smart Hitch (DID DE00, Byte-20, Bit-3) = "Enabled" (1): set when signal Trlr_M_Actl = 0x7FF (Fault) or VehFalr_D_Stat = 0x7 (Fault) for more than five (5) seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Illumination will be full nighttime brightness. 360 Lighting will no longer function. OBS and Smart Hitch Fault Screen will appear. Smart Hitch Fault Screen will appear.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Private Communication Network

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true. See also On-Demand Self-Test (RID $0202).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: SDARS Radio (DID DE00, Byte-3, Bit-3) configured as "Present" (1): Set when SRM doesn't respond to SRM commands or has an error state when all retries have been exhausted (~2 minutes). When On-Demand test is requested, APIM will send diagnostic request over ICAN and wait for response from SRM. Will set DTC DA0087 if valid response is not received in 10 seconds with at least three retries. (Only takes one pass to not set DTC). Any data shall pass the test.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Switch Pack

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 3. ICP(EFP) Network (DID DE01, Byte-9, Bit-3) is set to "LIN" (1). Test is run if 1, 2, and 3 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If (ICP(EFP) Network (DID DE01, Byte-9, Bit-3) is set to "LIN" (1)) AND (ICP(EFP) (DID DE01, Byte-11, Bit-4) is set to "Present" (0)): set when ICP indicates Rotary Knob or Volume Knob error.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Rotary Knob or Volume Knob may not work.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 3. ICP Subtype (DID DE01, Byte-11, Bit-2-1) is set to "Mini ICP" (01). Test is run if 1, 2, and 3 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when MiniICP indicates a Circuit Error.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 3. ICP Subtype (DID DE01, Byte-11, Bit-2-1) is set to "Mini ICP" (01). Test is run if 1, 2, and 3 are true.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: One or more of the Hardware Buttons will not be working.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 3. ICP(EFP) Network (DID DE01, Byte-9, Bit-3) is set to "LIN" (1). Test is run if 1, 2, and 3 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If (ICP(EFP) Network (DID DE01, Byte-9, Bit-3) is set to "LIN" (1)) AND (ICP(EFP) (DID DE01, Byte-11, Bit-4) is set to "Present" (0)): set when ICP indicates Low Voltage.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 3. ICP(EFP) Network (DID DE01, Byte-9, Bit-3) is set to "LIN" (1). Test is run if 1, 2, and 3 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If (ICP(EFP) Network (DID DE01, Byte-9, Bit-3) is set to "LIN" (1)) AND (ICP(EFP) (DID DE01, Byte-11, Bit-4) is set to "Present" (0)): set when ICP indicates High Voltage.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 3. ICP Subtype (DID DE01, Byte-11, Bit-2-1) is set to "Mini ICP" (01). Test is run if 1, 2, and 3 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when MiniICP indicates a Configuration Error
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Mini ICP may not be operating correctly.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 3. ICP(EFP) Network (DID DE01, Byte-11, Bit-5) is set to "LIN" (1). Test is run if 1, 2, and 3 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If (ICP(EFP) Network (DID DE01, Byte-9, Bit-3) is set to "LIN" (1)) AND (ICP(EFP) (DID DE01, Byte-11, Bit-4) is set to "Present" (0)): set when ICP button is stuck for greater (>) than two (2) minutes.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Button stops transmitting on CAN and is considered to be not pressed.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 3. ICP Subtype (DID DE01, Byte-11, Bit-2-1) is set to "Mini ICP" (01). Test is run if 1, 2, and 3 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when MiniICP indicates an Indicator Error.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Any of the indocators may not be illuminated

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. 3. Packages selected for download. Test is run if 1 and 2 and 3 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Software package not available.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Initial Configuration Not Complete

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: APIM has not received initial configuration for Blocks DE00-DE08.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Control Module Configuration Incompatible

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: DTC is triggered if any of the following ([1] through [49]) are true: [1] Config-Block 0 (DID DE00) "SDARS Radio Present" (Byte-3, Bit-3) is set to "SDARS Radio" (1) and DE00 "DAB" (Byte-1, Bit-0) is set to "Available" (1). [2] Config-Block 0 (DID DE00) "Number of Mixed Mode Presets Per Page" (Byte-4, Bits-2-1) is set to "Reserved (11). [3] Config-Block 0 (DID DE00) "Park Hold" (Byte-6, Bits-2-1) is set to "Reserved" (10) or "Reserved" (11). [4] Config-Block 0 (DID DE00) "Type of RVC Camera" (Byte-6, Bit-0) is configured other than hardware is setup for. [5] Config-Block 0 (DID DE00) "HW SWC" (Byte-9, Bits-7-6) is set to "Reserved" (11). [6] Config-Block 0 (DID DE00) "Enhanced Memory" (Byte-9, Bit-1) is set to "Disabled" (0) and DE00 "Rocket Setup" (Byte-19, Bit-4) is set to "Enabled" (1). [13] Config-Block 0 (DID DE00) "Architecture Version" (Byte-12, Bits-1-0) is set to "Reserved" (00) or "Reserved" (11). [14] Config-Block 0 (DID DE00) "Dark Car Mode" (Byte-13, Bits-4-3) is set to "Reserved" (11). [15] Config-Block 0 (DID DE00) "Trailer Measurement" (Byte-15, Bits-7-6) is set to "Reserved" (11). [16] Config-Block 1 (DID DE01) "List Browser" (Byte-1, Bits-4-3) is set to "Reserved" (11). [17] Config-Block 1 (DID DE01) "Rear Climate" (Byte-3, Bit-5) is set to "Available" (1) and DE01 "Quad Zone" (Byte-5, Bit-5) is set to "Enabled" (1). [18] Config-Block 1 (DID DE01) "ICP Subtype" (Byte-11 Bits-2-1) is set to "Reserved" (10) or "Reserved" (11). [19] Config-Block 1 (DID DE01) "Keypad (Length of Keycode)" (Byte-12, Bits-4-3) is set to "Reserved" (10) or "Reserved" (11). [22] Config-Block 1 (DID DE01) "Display Mode Default" (Byte-14, Bits-3-2) is set to "Reserved" (11). [23] Config-Block 1 (DID DE01) "QT HMI Themes" (Byte-14, Bits-1-0) is set to "Reserved" (11). [24] Config-Block 2 (DID DE02) "WERS Destination Code" (Bytes 1-2) do not match a valid country-code. [25] Config-Block 2 (DID DE02) "Vehicle Style" (Byte-4) is set to "Undefined" (0x00). DTC.DESCRIPTION: Ethernet Failure With Gateway Module A (GWM)

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If 50% of the MAC frames received during a 5 second period have invalid CRC from the Gateway Module then set the DTC.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If the link status is down, then set the DTC.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once at the start of every ignition cycle.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Non-memory failure. See fault DIDs 804A and 804B. GPS Chipset failure.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: When the APIM has entered into Recovery Mode

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Gyro has an error for greater than five seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Dead reckoning may not work properly
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Dead reckoning may not work properly

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set for Flash ROM checksum failure, EEPROM checksum failure, or EEPROM write failure (after retries have failed) If ECU Calibration Data #1 has not been programmed with a valid value via Method 3, this DTC will be triggered (see Memory Areas::ECU Calibration Data #1).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: APIM will cease to function normally
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: APIM will cease to function normally

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when keymgr is unable to read a key from encrypted storage on the /dps partition.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: - SOA may not be operational - Cloud communications may not be operational - OBD port may not be operational
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: - SOA may not be operational - Cloud communications may not be operational - OBD port may not be operational

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Set DTC (1 or 2 or 3 or 4 or 5) (1) Ignition OFF->ON (2) Load a token (3) Remove a token (4) Every 24 hours (5) Power OFF->ON
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: 1) PASS: no token exists on SYNC 2) FAIL: any token exists on SYNC (note: ap_logging token doesnt raise the DTC in current implementation)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Warning to the user that the APIM is in development mode.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Warning to the user that the APIM is in development mode.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set for IPC Link Down.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Battery Voltage

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is above 9 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when Battery Voltage is Below (<) 10 volts for greater than 10 seconds. Will Set F00316 if below 10 volts during test for greater than 250 ms for On-Demand-Self-Test.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Normal Operating Conditions begin to shut down. CAN communication will work until voltage drops below 9 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Normal Operating Conditions begin to shut down. CAN communication will work until voltage drops below 9 volts.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. 2. Voltage is above 9 volts. Test is run if 1 and 2 are true.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when Battery Voltage is Greater (>) 16 volts for greater than 5.5 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Normal Operating Conditions may begin to shut down.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Normal Operating Conditions may begin to shut down.

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Valid Application Software is NOT Present

ROUTINE.NAME: Configure Private Sub Nodes And Collect Private Sub Node Part Numbers
